ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_type" TEXT /* Type of drone (e.g., quadcopter, hexacopter) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the drone in km/h */,
  "range" REAL /* Maximum range of the drone in km */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the drone (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the drone */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current GPS coordinates of the drone */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone making the flight */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin waypoint of the flight */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target waypoint of the flight */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date and time the flight started */,
  "date_finished" TEXT /* Date and time the flight finished */,
  "duration" REAL /* Total duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the flight in km */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Summary of weather conditions during the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES waypoints ("waypoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES waypoints ("waypoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waypoints" (
  "waypoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waypoint */,
  "waypoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the waypoint */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the waypoint (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the waypoint in meters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of waypoint (e.g., delivery point, charging station) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waypoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "origin_waypoint" INTEGER /* ID of the origin waypoint */,
  "target_waypoint" INTEGER /* ID of the target waypoint */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the two waypoints in km */,
  "traffic_density" INTEGER /* Air traffic density on the edge */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the edge (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_origin_waypoint FOREIGN KEY ("origin_waypoint") REFERENCES waypoints ("waypoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_target_waypoint FOREIGN KEY ("target_waypoint") REFERENCES waypoints ("waypoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being delivered */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone making the delivery */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight carrying the package */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., pending, in-progress, completed) */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_assignments_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_assignments_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the package in kg */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the package (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "recipient_info" TEXT /* Recipient details (e.g., name, address) */,
  "delivery_instructions" TEXT /* Special instructions for delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_paths" (
  "flight_path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight path */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "waypoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waypoint */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time the drone arrived at the waypoint */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time the drone left the waypoint */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of travel between waypoints in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_paths_waypoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("waypoint_id") REFERENCES waypoints ("waypoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_paths_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., takeoff, landing, delivery) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the operation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the operation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in % */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_traffic_data" (
  "air_traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air traffic data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude in meters */,
  "airspeed" REAL /* Airspeed in km/h */,
  "traffic_density" INTEGER /* Air traffic density at the time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("air_traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_traffic_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error message */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., performance, security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
